title: common-vault
description: Vault paths + concurrency lock config per docs/architecture/vault-concurrency.md.

vault_root.description: Per-tenant vault root on Hetzner LUKS-mounted volume per Day-4 §6.5.

voice_subdir.description: Relative to vault_root; holds style-guide.md + banned-phrases.md + voice samples.

playbook_subdir.description: Per-tenant operating procedures referenced by agents.

spot_check_subdir.description: Queue directory written by autosend_spot_check_enqueue per autosend-safety-policy §4.

secrets_env_path.description: chmod 0600; loaded by render-agent .env synthesis per ADR-003 §2.1 row 3 + Day-4 §6.5.

lock_timeout_seconds.description: OP_LOCK_TIMEOUT_S per vault-concurrency §2; flock acquisition budget.

retry_backoff_ms.description: OP_RETRY_BACKOFF_MS per vault-concurrency §3; optimistic-concurrency retry pause.

cascade_timeout_ms.description: CASCADE_TIMEOUT_MS per vault-concurrency §5; rewrite-backlinks cascade budget.

obsidian_debounce_max_retries.description: MAX_RETRIES per vault-concurrency §4; raises ESC_VAULT_HUMAN_EDIT_BLOCKED on exhaust.
